title: Premium Extra-Strong Non-Stick Aluminium Foil 2 Roll Pack 10M × 300mm Heavy Duty Kitchen Foil for BBQ, Food Wrapping, Baking, Cooking & Catering Indoor/Outdoor Use Dealonic®
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Heavy-Duty Strength for Everyday & Professional Use Made from premium-grade aluminium, this extra-strong foil is engineered to withstand high heat, frequent handling, and heavy food portions without tearing. Ideal for home kitchens, catering environments, meal prep stations, food service counters, roasting pans, and BBQ setups, it provides reliable support whether you’re cooking, storing, covering trays, or protecting food during transport.

Advanced Non-Stick Coating for Cleaner, Easier Cooking Built with a high-performance non-stick surface that prevents food from clinging to the foil, helping you cook and release meals effortlessly. Perfect for grilling meats, roasting vegetables, baking fish, preparing parcels, and avoiding messy residue. The non-stick layer reduces waste, keeps food intact, and saves time on cleaning, making it highly efficient for regular and professional use.

Great Value 2-Pack – Total 20 m of Foil for Long-Term Use Each pack contains two full-size rolls, each measuring 10 m in length and 300 mm in width — providing a total of 20 m of premium non-stick aluminium foil. This generous quantity ensures extended use for daily cooking, batch meal preparation, catering needs, takeaway packaging, or event food service, giving you exceptional value and convenience.

Multipurpose Foil for Cooking, Wrapping & Catering Designed for a wide range of uses: BBQ grilling, sandwich wrapping, oven lining, baking trays, covering dishes, freezing food, storing leftovers, and cooking parcels. Its strong build makes it ideal for catering services, food trucks, takeaway shops, meal delivery, and household kitchens. Whether hot or cold, this foil maintains food quality, shape, and freshness.

Excellent Heat Retention & Food Protection Provides secure coverage that locks in heat, moisture, and flavour, helping your meals stay warm and fresh for longer periods. Also protects food from dryness, contamination, odours, and freezer burn. Perfect for transporting cooked meals, storing leftovers, preparing packed lunches, and covering dishes for serving — making it a dependable solution for both domestic and commercial food handling.
description: Premium Extra-Strong Non-Stick Aluminium Foil – 2 Pack (Total 20m) ✔ Heavy-Duty Strength for Home & Catering This premium aluminium foil is designed for demanding kitchen and catering tasks. Its extra-strong structure resists tearing and punctures, providing reliable support during cooking, grilling, baking, wrapping, and food storage. Suitable for home kitchens, professional catering, meal prep stations, BBQ events, and food service operations. ✔ Advanced Non-Stick Coating for Effortless Cooking Featuring a high-performance non-stick surface, this foil prevents food from sticking, allowing easy release and cleaner results. Ideal for grilling meat, roasting vegetables, baking fish, preparing foil parcels, and reducing mess. The non-stick layer saves time, reduces food waste, and keeps delicate items intact during cooking. ✔ Great Value Pack – 20m Total Foil Length Each pack includes two full-size rolls , each measuring 10m long and 300mm wide. With a total of 20m of premium aluminium foil, you have long-lasting supply for daily cooking, meal planning, catering service, takeaway packaging, and food preparation needs. Designed for both household and commercial environments. ✔ Multipurpose Use for Cooking, Wrapping & Storage Perfect for BBQs, sandwich wrapping, oven lining, baking trays, roasting dishes, meal prepping, storing leftovers, and protecting food in the freezer. This heavy-duty foil is also ideal for restaurants, food trucks, catering services, takeaway shops, and event kitchens. Suitable for both hot and cold food handling. ✔ Superior Heat Retention & Food Protection Designed to lock in heat, flavour, and moisture, helping meals stay warm and fresh for longer. This foil shields food from odours, contamination, and freezer burn while keeping it well-preserved. Perfect for transporting cooked meals, covering dishes, storing leftovers, or preparing food for events and gatherings. Upgrade your kitchen and catering essentials with this reliable, versatile, and long-lasting non-stick aluminium foil —a must-have for cooking, wrapping, storing, grilling, and protecting food with confidence.
